arguments.name: revenue_defense

tasks.title: Document R1M bank transfer
tasks.description: Obtain and attach bank records showing the R1,000,000 transfer from RegimA Zone Ltd UK to ZA operations

tasks.title: Compile investment allocation breakdown
tasks.description: Detail how R1M was allocated: infrastructure, salaries, systems, operations

tasks.title: Cross-reference with expense records
tasks.description: Match investment amount with actual expenses incurred for business setup

paragraphs.title: R1M Investment Evidence
paragraphs.content: RegimA Zone Ltd (UK) invested R1,000,000 in South African operations, funding all infrastructure, staff, and systems

features.title: Payment Structure Analysis
features.description: Detailed analysis of RegimA Zone Ltd payment flows and investment structure

arguments.description: Prove RegimA Zone Ltd made legitimate R1M investment showing proper business structure
arguments.strategy: Demonstrate R1,000,000 investment vs R1,000 admin fee (0.1%) proves no profiteering intent

arguments.name: bad_faith_litigation

tasks.title: Map destruction to interdict timing
tasks.description: Show how document destruction preceded interdict filing

paragraphs.title: Document Destruction Timeline
paragraphs.content: Timeline shows Peter cancelled cards/emails, then filed interdict claiming respondents couldn't prove ownership

features.title: Timeline Evidence of Bad Faith
features.description: Chronological analysis of Peter's actions demonstrates calculated delay tactics

arguments.description: Expose Peter's strategic delays and document destruction to undermine respondents' defense
arguments.strategy: Timeline analysis shows Peter deliberately delayed proceedings while causing maximum business harm
